_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Design, implement, test, and evaluate secure interfaces between information systems, physical systems, and/or embedded technologies.
reference_document_element_description: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.480), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.479).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.488). Shared vocabulary: [implement]. DCWF-only terms [design, embedded, evaluate, information, interfaces, physical] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, ai, application, audit, controls, defenses] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.859, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Design, implement, test, and evaluate secure interfaces between information syst" and "Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.503 ≈ STS 0.488 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [implement] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Shared tokens: [implement]. DCWF-only: [design, embedded, evaluate, information, interfaces, physical]. WIDAI-only: [access, ai, application, audit, controls, defenses].
